summary: Phase 4 BUILD for Captains Fish and Chicken. Scaffolded the restaurant archetype, authored all six data collections from sealed Phase 0/2 inputs (owner-confirmed menu, 6 occasions, 10 landings, 2 genuine-fact neighborhoods), linked the local engine, graph-seeded, wired, and built. Astro build SUCCEEDED: 35/35 internal routes + sitemap. factory validate exits 1 — the ONLY blocking gate is do-not-ship-guards, tripped by the declared identity fixtures (G-XXXXXXXXXX + .example) exactly as designed; all other gates (route-completeness 35, schema-floor, cro-block-presence, sap-anti-doorway, graph-gate) pass. AMENDED-REBUILD 2026-07-07: owner supplied the real brand logo; site rebranded to navy/gold via project shadow channel (token Base layout, navy sticky header w/ logo, navy footer, overlay heroes, card-grid menu, mobile sticky call bar via site.ctaPrimary) and imagery wired (93 Higgsfield assets: 87 menu items + heroes + logo). Rebuild still 35/35 routes; validate still fails ONLY on the intended identity fixtures.

checklist.note: business/site/menu (deterministic) + occasions/landings/neighborhoods (schema-bound content agents); no fabrication (no calamari, no NewBo, no dine-in claim, no 2nd location, hours say call-to-confirm)
35/35 internal routes built; matches Phase 2 matrix exactly

checklist.reason: do-not-ship-guards fails on declared identity fixtures per owner deferral; resolved at Phase 7 by swapping real domain/email/GA4 — the gate working, not a defect
